name: Montserrado County (Liberia)
description: Blue field with the Liberian national flag as a canton in the upper hoist and a white architectural device on the fly side representing the Capitol and the city of Monrovia, capital of Liberia and seat of Montserrado County.
history: Presented by President William V. S. Tubman on 29 November 1965 together with the flags of the other Liberian counties.

features.symbolism: Montserrado as part of the Republic of Liberia
Monrovia, the national capital, situated in Montserrado County
